comment: Act 1 menu labyrinth — live typography OVER the illustrated panel assets (DL61 rebuild; supersedes the 14-row DOM menu of DL57). The painted panels supply the density; the DOM adds 8 meaningful dishes (brief: 6–10), names verbatim from menu-lines.json (A7 ground truth: international-heavy + Senegalese classics). Prices generic and currency-free (DL59). Descriptions exist only on the dot's three hesitation targets (DL60). `top` = fraction of the panel's height where the live row sits.

items.name: Nems au poulet (×6)
items.description: Croustillants, sauce aigre-douce maison, coriandre fraîche. Par six.

items.name: Poulet Yassa
items.description: Oignons confits au citron, olives, riz brisé. Accompagnement au choix, selon arrivage.

items.name: Dibi mouton
items.description: Grillé au feu de bois, oignons, moutarde. Portion selon le marché du jour.
